descriptionEn: Name means "joined" or "attached." He is the son of Melki or Melchi and father of Matthat, a Judahite listed in Luke's genealogy of Jesus Christ. Note, there are two Levi's listed in Luke's genealogy, plus a few others in Scripture.

verses.line: Which was the son of Matthat, which was the son of Levi, which was the son of Melchi, which was the son of Janna, which was the son of Joseph,
